items.label: Infra Outputs Captured — Interfaces Written
messages: The infra-handoff phase is complete. Here's what was accomplished:  1. **Read Terraform outputs** from the live state in `apps/sample-app/infra/` — all 14 outputs captured successfully. 2. **Created `infra-interfaces.md`** at `apps/sample-app/in-progress/infra-interfaces.md` with:    - **Endpoints** — Function App, APIM Gateway, Static Web App, Cosmos DB URLs    - **Resource Names** — all key resource identifiers    - **Auth Config** — Entra tenant/client IDs, dual-mode auth details    - **Cosmos DB context** — documents the pre-existing infrastructure from `webhook-dispatcher` and the new `Tasks` container needed    - **Full Terraform outputs table** — with `application_insights_connection_string` masked as `<HIDDEN>` (sensitive)    - **Downstream agent notes** — actionable guidance for backend-dev, frontend-dev, e2e-dev, infra-architect, and cicd-dev 3. **Committed** the interfaces file and **marked `infra-handoff` as done** in the pipeline.

shellCommands.command: cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && bash tools/autonomous-factory/agent-commit.sh pipeline "chore(pipeline): infra-handoff interfaces"
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && npm run pipeline:complete kanban-task-board infra-handoff
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && bash tools/autonomous-factory/agent-commit.sh pipeline "chore(pipeline): mark Infra Outputs Captured — Interfaces Written"

items.label: Development Complete — Frontend
messages: Now let me explore the key files I need to work with:
Good - the schemas already exist. Let me read the key files I need:
Now let me look at existing pages and the E2E fixture for patterns:
Good - the schemas are already in place with barrel exports. Let me look at the existing page pattern and E2E fixture:
I have enough context. Let me now implement the frontend. First, let me run preflight on NavBar since I'll modify it:
Low blast radius on NavBar. Let me now create the tasks page and modify NavBar:
Now update the NavBar to add the "Task Board" link:
Now let me run the tests and build to verify:
Build passes clean. Now run linting:
Lint passes clean. Now verify E2E tests compile:
All 10 E2E tests compile successfully. Now let me review changes and check lockfile:
Lockfile is in sync. Review shows no breaking changes and moderate risk (mostly from novelty). Now let me check the CI/CD workflow for any env var updates needed:
Good - the env vars are already properly configured in the frontend deploy workflow. No CI/CD changes needed from the frontend side.  Now let me commit:
Now let me add the doc-note and mark complete:

shellCommands.command: cd /workspaces/DAGent-t/apps/sample-app && npx playwright test --config playwright.config.ts --list 2>&1 | tail -20
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && bash tools/autonomous-factory/agent-commit.sh frontend "feat(frontend): add Kanban task board page with optimistic UI and E2E tests

cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && npm run pipeline:doc-note kanban-task-board frontend-dev "Added /tasks Kanban board page with 3 columns (To Do, In Progress, Done), optimistic status transitions via buttons
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && npm run pipeline:complete kanban-task-board frontend-dev
